description_long: This bungalow features a large, two-story main building with a prominent front entrance, flanked by symmetrical windows and a covered porch. The structure is accompanied by several outbuildings, including a detached garage, a small shed, and a spacious wooden deck with a gazebo-style roof. The main house has a gable roof with dormer windows, and the exterior is finished in light-colored materials with darker accents on the roof and trim. The property is connected by paved walkways and steps, creating a cohesive residential compound. The deck area is fenced and includes a central post, likely for lighting or decorative purposes. Overall, the design blends traditional bungalow elements with modern amenities, suitable for a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A large, two-story bungalow with a gable roof, covered porch, multiple outbuildings, and a fenced wooden deck. The property features symmetrical windows and paved walkways connecting the structures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, symmetrical windows, and the full layout of outbuildings and the fenced deck.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the roof structure, dormer windows, and the spatial relationship between the main house and outbuildings.
description_view_2: Opposite front view focusing on the deck area, gazebo roof, and the rear facade of the main house.
description_view_3: Top-down/side view emphasizing the overall property layout, including the deck, walkways, and arrangement of all buildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and dormer windows
